lines: Yes' aragutegereza; N' inshuti yawe. Araguhamagar' ati : Ngwino hano !
Ita ku magambo meza Akubwir' ati : Nabambiwe kugira ngo Ngucungure.
Mbes’ ubuntu bwanjye bwinshi Ubwangir' iki ? Ntiwanyemera, nkaguha Agakiza?
Mbese ntiwamaz' imyaka myishi mu byaha, Ur' imbata ya Satani, Nturambiwe?
None, reka nkubohore, Naw' unyizere, Unkurikire wishimye, Ub' uwanjye.
Yesu yahoz' akubwira Kensh' ibyo byiza; Dore, n'ub' arakwinginga ! Wamwang'ute?
We gutind' ahar' ijwi rye Ryahora vuba; Ubu n'igihe gikundwa, We gutinda.
Mwami Yesu, singitinda; Noneho ndaje. Ububata bwawe bwiza Ni bwo nkunze.
